use_cases: Landing pages for early-stage product launches to capture user interest
Email list growth campaigns with engaging success feedback
Building buzz around upcoming product releases
Waitlist management for SaaS onboarding flows
Campaign landing pages needing high-conversion signup forms
ai_summary: A dynamic waitlist hero section featuring an email capture form with canvas-based confetti animation on successful submission. The component manages idle, loading, and success states with particle physics simulation creating an energetic success experience. Built for high-conversion landing pages across SaaS, e-commerce, and creator platforms with a vibrant, colorful visual style.
